corrections.location: first line, opening word after Β
corrections.current: θείς δὲ εἰς τῶν ἐν Νινευὴ
corrections.correct: θείς δὲ εἷς τῶν ἐν Νινευὴ
corrections.note: Printed text has εἷς, not εἰς.

corrections.current: Ἀχιάχαρον τὸν Ἀναὴλ υἱὸν τοῦ ἀδελφοῦ μου
corrections.correct: Ἀχιάχαρον τὸν Ἀναὴλ υἱὸν τὸν ἀδελφοῦ μου
corrections.note: The printed body includes τὸν before ἀδελφοῦ μου.
A second ἦν is present at the line break: ἦν δὲ ἐξάδελφός μου.
Remove stray verse number '1' before Ὅτε; it is not printed in the body line.
The name is printed without the extra epsilon/iota sequence.

corrections.current: εἰς τις τῶν ἐκ τῆς Νινευὴ
corrections.correct: εἷς τις τῶν ἐκ τῆς Νινευὴ

corrections.note: The apparatus here reads Ἀχιάχαρος, not Ἀχείχαρος.
Printed form lacks ει after ρ.
Lemma in the note is βασιλειας, matching the printed apparatus.

notes: Running head matches. Body transcription is largely accurate, but one body word is missing (τὸν) and a stray verse number was inserted before chapter II. Apparatus has several misreadings, especially names and one lemma in the lower critical notes.
